name: Vaishno Devi Temple
description: One of the holiest and most visited Hindu pilgrimage sites in the world, dedicated to Goddess Maha Lakshmi. Pilgrims undertake a 12 km trek from Katra to reach the sacred cave.
history: The temple is mentioned in the Mahabharata. It is believed the Goddess meditated in the cave to attain spiritual perfection.
famousFor: Sacred cave shrine, 12km pilgrimage trek, spiritual energy.
